description_long: This hardware store is a large, rectangular commercial building with a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a flat roof and a prominent, boxy facade, with the word 'NOVUS' clearly displayed on the front. The exterior is primarily composed of light gray and white materials, with a smooth, uniform finish and subtle vertical paneling along the lower sections. The building appears to have a main entrance on the front right side, with large window-like sections that may serve as display or entry areas. The left portion of the building is slightly taller and set back, creating a stepped profile. There are no visible exterior decorations, advertisements, or hardware displays, emphasizing a clean and functional appearance.
description: A large, modern hardware store with a flat roof, light gray facade, and the 'NOVUS' sign on the front. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible exterior displays.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped profile, with the taller left section and the main building volume extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view featuring the 'NOVUS' signage, main entrance area, and window-like sections along the facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the taller section now on the right, with the main building volume extending left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the building with no visible entrances or windows.
attribute_storefront_signage: The signage consists of the word 'NOVUS' in large, modern sans-serif letters, placed on the right side of the front facade. The text is subtle and matches the light gray color scheme.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a main entrance and window-like sections on the right side, with the 'NOVUS' sign above. The facade is clean and uncluttered, with no visible exterior displays or decorations.
